hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]:/])(master|main)([[:space:]:]|$)'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: git push to master/main is not allowed. Push to a feature branch and open a PR instead."}}'; fi

echo 'MANDATORY: You just created a PR. Start the Phase 3 CI monitoring loop NOW. Read .github/workflows/, then poll gh pr checks every 3 minutes until unit tests and integration tests pass with grep evidence. Do NOT report success or stop until CI is verified.'

echo 'You just pushed. If this push updates an open PR, RESUME the Phase 3 CI monitoring loop: re-read gh pr checks and poll every 3 minutes until unit and integration tests pass with grep evidence. The 2-hour budget resets on this push. Do NOT stop while CI is red.'
